description: An IT auditor checks if employee access is promptly removed upon termination.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all employees who left the company in the last 6 months.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has a list of terminated employees.

nodes.task_description: For a sample of 30 terminated employees, check the system access logs to verify their access was disabled on their last day of employment.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor finds 3 cases where access remained active for more than 24 hours after termination.

nodes.task_description: Document the exceptions as a control failure, as it creates a risk of unauthorized post-termination activity.

expected_outcome.value: A finding is drafted detailing the control weakness.
